typologies.name: Dormant Account Abuse
typologies.description: An account with historically low activity suddenly initiates high-velocity or high-value transfers.

typologies.name: Synthetic Identity
typologies.description: An account exhibiting behaviors indicative of non-human or artificially constructed profiles.

typologies.name: Account Takeover (ATO)
typologies.description: Sudden deviation in geographical or device origin combined with immediate fund transfers.

typologies.name: Money Mule Network
typologies.description: Rapid succession of incoming deposits followed immediately by outbound transfers to multiple accounts.
